top.title: Myanmar ex-leader Aung San Suu Kyi moved to house arrest, military says
top.summary: The Nobel Peace Prize laureate has been in detention since she was ousted in a military coup in 2021.

top.title: Oil price hits highest since 2022 after report Trump to be briefed on new Iran options

top.title: 'How are we going to get back home?' Islamist group tightens blockade on Mali capital
top.summary: The blockade comes days after Mali's defence minister was assassinated in a series of nationwide attacks.

top.title: OpenAI tells ChatGPT models to stop talking about goblins
